meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Marketing for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between coding and growth. Learn to debug marketing friction using AI-powered workflows with Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Marketing is just another codebase to debug. By treating your landing page and outreach as iterative cycles, you can use AI to analyze conversion bottlenecks, optimize copy, and automate feedback loops. Stop guessing at growth; use structured debugging to transform your technical project into a market-ready product.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks architecting the perfect backend, but your dashboard shows zero traction. The silence of an empty user base is the most brutal bug a developer can face. It is not that your code is broken; it is that your product’s 'marketing layer' is failing to compile for your audience. 

Stop viewing marketing as a mystical art. It is a system of logic, inputs, and outputs. With the right AI-driven debugging workflow, you can diagnose conversion leaks as easily as you fix a null pointer exception. We are going to turn your technical precision into a growth engine.

steps.title: Define the Conversion Funnel
steps.description: Before fixing, you must map the flow. Use AI to identify where users drop off by analyzing your current UI/UX against industry benchmarks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current landing page logic as a conversion funnel. Identify the top 3 friction points where a user might abandon the site based on typical SaaS user behavior.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'analyze landing page code for UX bottlenecks'

steps.title: Refactor Copy for Clarity
steps.description: Technical jargon kills conversions. Use AI to refactor your marketing copy into value-based messaging that speaks to the user's pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Rewrite the hero section of my app to focus on user benefits rather than technical features. Keep it concise, persuasive, and under 50 words.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit index.html --apply 'update hero copy to value-focused messaging'

steps.title: Implement Analytics Hooks
steps.description: You cannot debug what you cannot measure. Inject tracking logic to capture user events at critical interaction nodes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight event tracking snippet for my React app that triggers on button clicks and form submissions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'add telemetry to key user interaction points'

steps.title: Simulate User Personas
steps.description: Run an AI-powered 'stress test' on your messaging to see if it resonates with your target demographic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a busy student developer. Review my landing page and tell me why you would or would not sign up for this product.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'perform user persona audit on landing page'

steps.title: Automate Growth Feedback Loops
steps.description: Create a system where user feedback is automatically fed into your development roadmap to iterate faster.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a schema for a feedback loop that captures user complaints and categorizes them by severity and feature impact.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement automated feedback collection schema'

pro_tips: Treat marketing copy like a Git branch; A/B test your headlines with the same rigor you use for unit tests.
Use AI to generate 'negative personas' to identify who your product is NOT for, saving you from wasting time on the wrong leads.
Map your feature roadmap to specific user pain points so every release is inherently marketable.
Automate your social proof by using AI to summarize positive feedback into ready-to-share testimonials.
When debugging marketing, prioritize the 'First 10 Seconds' experience; if they don't get the value by then, the rest of the app doesn't matter.
content.next_steps: Deploy your optimized landing page, track the conversion data for 48 hours, and return to the Claude Code CLI to iterate based on the new metrics.
content.conversion_block: You have the technical skills; now you have the growth framework. Stop letting your code sit in the shadows of the internet. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
